title: FBI probing deaths and disappearances of 10 top scientists linked to UFO investigation
description: Bureau director Kash Patel says agents are 'going to look for connections' and should they uncover 'nefarious conduct or conspiracy' they will make arrests

title: Trump hints at contents of UFO files to be released
description: WASHINGTON — President Donald Trump says the Pentagon is preparing to release some “very interesting” UFO files uncovered by his administration, generating a mix of buzz and skepticism as he hints at new revelations around questions of alien life.

title: UFO sighting? Here's the truth behind Hawaii's green glow
description: A mysterious green glow in the sky over Hawaii has sparked widespread speculation, with some even suggesting it could be a UFO.

title: Trump Says 'Very Interesting' UFO Files Are Coming
description: President Trump says the Pentagon is preparing to release some "very interesting" UFO files uncovered by his administration, generating a mix of buzz and skepticism as he hints at new revelations around questions of alien life, the AP reports.
